title: tissa leiosperma
side_effects: Tissa leiosperma can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. It may also lead to allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Prolonged or excessive use of the plant can cause liver and kidney damage, and may interact negatively with certain medications. Furthermore, improper use of tissa leiosperma may also lead to cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and low blood pressure.
